company.about: The Dimensions is a Nashik-based architecture and interior design studio shaping residential, commercial, and development projects with clarity, warmth, and long-term craft. From early concept to built detail, the studio turns ambitious spatial ideas into places that feel considered, useful, and memorable.
company.philosophy: Great architecture should feel inevitable: light arriving at the right time, materials aging with grace, and every plan quietly serving the lives inside it.
company.address: Aditya Towers, 1, near Gurukripa Building, Canada Corner, Nashik, Maharashtra 422005

projects.title: Brickline Residences
projects.concept: A contemporary mixed-use building where an active commercial base supports a warm, brick-clad residential volume shaped by balconies, greenery, and a strong urban corner identity.
projects.description: Brickline Residences is a mixed-use development in Govind Nagar, Nashik, designed by The Dimensions for Shreya Developers. The project combines ground-floor commercial shops with seven levels of residential apartments above, creating an active urban frontage while maintaining a refined residential identity. Spread across approximately 45,000 sq. ft., the building is shaped by warm brick, crisp white framing, recessed windows, glass balconies, and integrated greenery.
projects.longDescription: Located in the residential suburb of Govind Nagar, Nashik, Brickline Residences brings together everyday urban convenience and refined residential living. Commercial shops activate the front edge of the ground floor, while seven residential levels above are planned around efficient floor plates, balconies, natural light, ventilation, and planted edges. The architectural language balances exposed brick surfaces with clean white framing elements, giving the building a strong corner presence while keeping the expression contemporary and restrained.
projects.altText: Brickline Residences residential and commercial building in Govind Nagar Nashik by The Dimensions

projects.title: The Duet Villas
projects.description: A pair of contemporary villa residences designed around privacy, shared greens, and effortless indoor-outdoor living.
projects.altText: The Duet Villas residential villa project in Nashik by The Dimensions

projects.title: Purohit Nagar
projects.programme: Residential plotted layout with internal roads, open spaces, landscape zones, and plotted ownership formats
projects.concept: A graded plotted layout in Trimbakeshwar offering row-house, semi-detached, and detached NA plots within a single masterplanned community, positioned at the intersection of pilgrimage-town growth and long-term land value.
projects.description: Purohit Nagar is a 177-plot residential layout masterplan in Trimbakeshwar, Nashik, offering NA plots across row-house, semi-detached, and detached typologies. The layout balances density and openness, clustering compact plots along walkable streets while reserving larger detached plots for more independent holdings.
projects.longDescription: Located in Trimbakeshwar, one of Nashik's most significant pilgrimage towns and the site of the upcoming Kumbh Mela, Purohit Nagar is a plotted residential layout designed to offer a range of ownership formats within a single masterplanned community. The layout accommodates 177 NA plots across three typologies: compact row-house plots, mid-sized semi-detached plots, and larger standalone detached plots. Its planning strategy creates a deliberate gradation of plot sizes and built forms, with efficient walkable streets, clear internal road hierarchy, open spaces, landscape buffers, and flexible plot formats suited to both residential buyers and long-term land investment.
projects.altText: Purohit Nagar plotted residential layout masterplan in Trimbakeshwar Nashik by The Dimensions

projects.title: Shadow Line Residence
projects.description: A warm, material-rich residence where deep openings, filtered light, and measured proportions create a composed living experience.

projects.title: Poddar International School
projects.programme: Classrooms, staff and administrative spaces, terraces, and shared learning areas across four levels
projects.concept: A highway-fronting primary school where deep brick jaali screens filter light and heat across a stacked, terrace-broken classroom section, announced by a shaded entrance portico and a planted approach.
projects.description: Poddar International School is a primary school near Ozar on the Mumbai-Agra Highway, designed as a 35,000 sq. ft. G+3 educational building. The project organizes classrooms, administrative areas, shared learning spaces, and terraces across four levels, with deep terracotta brick jaali screens giving the school a strong identity while filtering heat and light for the classrooms within.
projects.longDescription: Sited along the Mumbai-Agra Highway near Ozar, Poddar International School occupies a prominent edge condition: a building that must register at highway scale while still functioning as an intimate, daily environment for young children. The facade is composed of full-height terracotta brick jaali screens set against a restrained white plastered base. These screens filter direct sun, soften classroom light, support natural ventilation, and give the institution a legible architectural rhythm. Open-air stairs, landings, and intermediate terraces break down the verticality of the G+3 section, while the entrance portico creates a shaded threshold for assembly, pickup, and drop-off. Dense planting and informal seating soften the transition from highway edge to learning environment.
projects.altText: Poddar International School primary school near Ozar Nashik by The Dimensions

projects.title: Sai Nagar
projects.approval: Tentative Approved Layout Certificate No. OMC/LT/2026/APL/00058, dated 3 April 2026
projects.programme: Compact residential plotted layout with NA-approved plots, internal roads, amenity space, landscape edges, and shared open areas
projects.concept: A compact, NA-approved plotted layout in Ozar offering a graded mix of row-house, semi-detached, and detached plots around generous internal roads and shared open space.
projects.description: Sai Nagar is a 46-plot NA-approved residential layout in Ozar (MIG), Nashik, spread across approximately 7,725 sq. m. The layout mixes row-house, semi-detached, and detached plots connected by 9-metre-wide internal roads and anchored by over 1,545 sq. m. of dedicated open and amenity space.
projects.longDescription: Located in Ozar (MIG), one of Nashik's fastest-growing residential corridors, Sai Nagar is a compact NA-approved residential layout spread across approximately 7,725 sq. m. of land. The layout accommodates 46 plots organized across row-house, semi-detached, and detached typologies, giving buyers a graded choice between compact row-house living and more self-contained plots within the same community. Its 9-metre-wide internal roads and generous amenity/open space help the project read as a planned neighbourhood rather than a dense plotted grid, while the tentative approved layout certificate gives buyers documented clarity on the layout's approval status.
projects.altText: Sai Nagar NA-approved plotted residential layout in Ozar Nashik by The Dimensions
